rolling_30d.summary: Bedrosians' local pages property is demonstrating strong upward momentum across core traffic and engagement metrics in the last 30 days. Sessions grew 8.2% MoM to 1,669, while engaged sessions jumped 12.6% MoM, indicating improving content relevance and user intent match. Organic Search surged 154.3% MoM to capture 63.1% of traffic—a significant win—while Paid Search contracted 87.7% MoM, suggesting either budget reallocation or reduced PPC performance. High-value conversion signals are positive: mainsite_clicks grew 14.9% MoM (957 events), outbound_clicks rose 9.6% MoM (1,101 events), and store_locate held steady with modest 8.5% growth (77 events). However, critical conversion events remain low in absolute volume: calls total only 2 events YTD, and scheduling/appointment events are absent entirely. The Anaheim location page (/california/anaheim/1235-south-state-college-boulevard) is a standout performer, exploding 378.3% MoM with 220 sessions and 57.3% engagement rate. YTD trajectory shows consistent monthly growth (Jan: 1,225 → Feb: 1,465 → Mar: 1,666 sessions), confirming the property is on an upward arc.

quick_wins.title: Organic Search dominance driving traffic efficiency
quick_wins.detail: Organic Search skyrocketed 154.3% MoM to 1,053 sessions (63.1% of traffic), replacing reliance on paid or direct channels. This organic lift suggests strong keyword performance and/or improved local SEO visibility for store location pages.

quick_wins.title: Anaheim location page proving high-intent funnel stage
quick_wins.detail: The /california/anaheim/1235-south-state-college-boulevard page accelerated 378.3% MoM with 220 sessions and 57.3% engagement—far outpacing other location pages. Replicate this page's structure, messaging, and CTA placement across underperforming location URLs.

quick_wins.title: mainsite_clicks growth signals deeper funnel progression
quick_wins.detail: mainsite_clicks grew 14.9% MoM to 957 events—the highest-value click type after conversion events—outpacing total traffic growth of 8.2%. This suggests users are finding value in local pages and moving to broader product/service exploration.

quick_wins.title: Reno location page emerging as high-growth opportunity
quick_wins.detail: The /nevada/reno/6970-longley-ln page generated 866.7% MoM growth (116 sessions, 61.2% engagement), indicating strong recent visibility lift or new traffic source. Monitor this page for conversion optimization opportunities.

potential_warnings.title: Paid Search budget collapse—87.7% MoM decline
potential_warnings.detail: Paid Search dropped from ~719 sessions to 89 sessions MoM (−87.7%), now representing only 5.3% of traffic. If this was a deliberate budget shift, confirm ROI assumptions; if unintentional, investigate bid strategy, quality score, or account changes immediately.

potential_warnings.title: Critical conversion event volume near-zero
potential_warnings.detail: Phone calls total only 2 YTD events, and no schedule_/appointment_ events recorded at all. Despite strong traffic and engagement, the property is not driving measurable phone or booking conversions—a major blind spot for a local services business.

potential_warnings.title: get_directions plummeted 67.6% MoM
potential_warnings.detail: get_directions fell from 36 to 12 events MoM (−67.6%), suggesting reduced map/navigation interaction. For a retail/showroom business, this decline may indicate broken location integration, poor CTA visibility, or users bouncing before location step.

potential_warnings.title: Become a Pro program disengagement
potential_warnings.detail: become_a_pro events dropped 13.3% MoM to just 13 events. If this is a key B2B or contractor funnel, the declining interest warrants messaging or program value review.

biggest_opportunities.title: Activate high-volume outbound_clicks toward mainsite conversions
biggest_opportunities.detail: 1,101 outbound_clicks is the single largest event bucket, but these are external exits with moderate conversion value. Test strategic placement of mainsite_clicks CTAs (which grew 14.9% MoM) in place of generic external links to recapture users earlier in the funnel.

biggest_opportunities.title: Implement phone call and booking event tracking immediately
biggest_opportunities.detail: With only 2 recorded calls and zero booking events YTD, the property is flying blind on actual revenue-driving conversions. Install call tracking pixels, form submission tracking, and appointment booking integrations across all location pages to measure true conversion funnel.

biggest_opportunities.title: Scale the Anaheim location page playbook to underperforming regions
biggest_opportunities.detail: The Anaheim page's 378.3% growth and 57.3% engagement rate far exceed other location pages (avg ~55–60% engagement but much lower traffic). Audit its on-page content, product showcase, inventory display, and CTA design, then apply to San Jose (−35.4% MoM), Seattle (−57.5% MoM), and (not set) pages.

biggest_opportunities.title: Fix or optimize store_locate and get_directions user path
biggest_opportunities.detail: store_locate (77 events, +8.5% MoM) and locate_me (35 events, −5.4% MoM) are moderate-intent signals, but get_directions collapsed 67.6% MoM. Audit the mapping/directions UX, test call-to-action prominence, and confirm integration with Google Maps and mobile navigation.

last_calendar_month.summary: Bedrosians' local pages property demonstrated strong MoM momentum in March 2026, with sessions climbing 13.7% to 1,666 and engaged sessions surging 18.1% to 909, reflecting a healthy 54.6% engagement rate (+2.0 pp). Organic Search emerged as the dominant traffic driver, delivering 1,030 sessions (+168.2% MoM)—a dramatic shift indicating successful SEO performance or algorithm recovery for location-based queries. High-value conversion signals remain modest but positive: mainsite_clicks (933 events, +15.0% MoM) and outbound_clicks (1,099 events, +14.5% MoM) both grew in line with overall traffic, while store_locate interactions jumped 24.2% to 82 events, signaling strong local intent. The Anaheim location page (/california/anaheim/1235-south-state-college-boulevard) exploded with 377.3% MoM growth to 210 sessions, suggesting either targeted campaign lift or organic visibility gains for that specific store. However, Paid Search collapsed 87.9% MoM and referral traffic fell 41.5%, indicating potential budget reallocation or campaign pausing; meanwhile, low-value events like internal_clicks spiked 98.4%, suggesting users are browsing locally but not deeply converting to calls or appointments. YTD 2026 stands at 4,356 sessions with steady month-over-month growth trajectory (Jan: 1,225 → Feb: 1,465 → Mar: 1,666).

quick_wins.title: Organic Search Momentum
quick_wins.detail: Organic Search surged 168.2% MoM to 1,030 sessions (61.8% of traffic), now the dominant channel—validate ranking improvements for high-intent location keywords and continue SEO investment in this area.

quick_wins.title: Anaheim Location Page Performance
quick_wins.detail: The /california/anaheim/1235-south-state-college-boulevard page generated 210 sessions with 57.6% engagement, up 377.3% MoM—investigate what drove this spike (organic visibility, local campaign, or content refresh) and replicate for other underperforming location pages.

quick_wins.title: Store Locator Engagement Growth
quick_wins.detail: store_locate events increased 24.2% MoM to 82 interactions, indicating strong local-intent traffic—ensure location pages have clear CTAs to drive these users toward calls or appointment bookings.

quick_wins.title: Overall Traffic Growth Stability
quick_wins.detail: Sessions and engaged sessions both grew double-digits MoM while engagement rate improved, showing consistent, healthy MoM trajectory across Q1 2026 (Jan: 1,225 → Feb: 1,465 → Mar: 1,666 sessions).

potential_warnings.title: Paid Search Collapse
potential_warnings.detail: Paid Search traffic plummeted 87.9% MoM to just 87 sessions (5.2% of total), down from ~700 estimated sessions in February—verify if campaigns were paused, budgets cut, or bids reduced, as this channel typically delivers high-intent users.

potential_warnings.title: Minimal High-Value Conversions
potential_warnings.detail: Despite 1,666 sessions and 909 engaged sessions, calls (0 tracked), book_now/scheduling events (2 call_for_appointment total), and become_a_pro (13 events, -13.3% MoM) remain extremely low—tracking or implementation gaps may be hiding true conversion volume, or UX barriers are preventing appointment booking.

potential_warnings.title: Get Directions Event Decline
potential_warnings.detail: get_directions fell 70.3% MoM to just 11 events, suggesting users are not moving from discovery to physical visit intent—this warrants review of map integration, CTAs, and mobile UX on location pages.

potential_warnings.title: Referral Traffic Erosion
potential_warnings.detail: Referral sessions declined 41.5% MoM to 24 events, indicating reduced partner/directory traffic or potential deindexing from high-authority referral sources—audit backlinks and local directory presence.

biggest_opportunities.title: Convert Store Locator Clicks to Calls/Appointments
biggest_opportunities.detail: 82 store_locate events and 37 locate_me interactions show users are finding locations, but only 2 call_for_appointment events and 0 tracked calls suggest a handoff failure—add prominent click-to-call buttons, hours, and instant booking CTAs on all location pages to capture high-intent traffic.

biggest_opportunities.title: Restore and Optimize Paid Search
biggest_opportunities.detail: Paid Search dropped 87.9% MoM but remains a high-intent channel—re-enable or expand campaigns targeting local location keywords (e.g., 'tile near me,' 'stone showroom [city]') to recapture traffic lost to organic competitor surge.

biggest_opportunities.title: Scale Anaheim Location Page Success Model
biggest_opportunities.detail: The Anaheim page achieved 377.3% growth to 210 sessions; audit its content, layout, internal links, and local SEO signals, then replicate for underperformers like /california/san-jose (56 sessions, -22.2% MoM) and /washington/seattle (33 sessions, -58.2% MoM).

biggest_opportunities.title: Rebuild Referral Channel
biggest_opportunities.detail: Referral traffic fell 41.5% MoM to 24 sessions—re-establish partnerships with local directories, review sites (Yelp, Google Business), and trade platforms to restore this secondary high-intent source.

biggest_opportunities.title: Improve Product Grid Click-Through Rate
biggest_opportunities.detail: product_grid_clicks (400 events) are the third-most frequent action but rarely lead to mainsite_clicks (933) or conversions—audit UX flow from product browse to mainsite CTA and add clearer value props or filtering to reduce bounce.
